text: Hello. Hello. Hello. Hey, good evening. This is Rachel. So I'm calling because their appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through South Carolina state relief, so have you received any notification about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you've received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
